facilities.name: Orange County Landfill
facilities.hours: Orange County posts current landfill hours on its landfill and transfer station page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and residency. Check the county rate schedule before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the county page to confirm accepted materials, payment methods, and public self-haul rules before driving.

facilities.name: McLeod Road Transfer Station
facilities.address: 5000 L B McLeod Rd, Orlando, FL 32811
facilities.hours: Orange County posts current transfer station hours on its landfill and transfer station page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Transfer fees vary by load type and residency. Confirm the current county fee schedule before arrival.
facilities.rules: Confirm accepted loads, vehicle rules, and any proof-of-residency requirements before driving.
